sentences.arabic: لَاحَظْتُ اخْتِلَافَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً بَيْنَ عَادَاتِ بَلَدِي وَعَادَاتِ الْبَلَدِ الَّذِي زُرْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Primijetio sam mnoge razlike između navika moje i navika zemlje koju sam posjetio.
sentences.translationEn: I noticed many differences between my country's customs and those of the country I visited.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَأْكُلُونَ بِطَرِيقَةٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ بِصَوْتٍ أَعْلَى.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su jeli na drugačiji način i govorili glasnije.
sentences.translationEn: People ate differently and spoke louder.

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلْتُ أَنْ أَتَكَيَّفَ مَعَ الْعَادَاتِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ وَأَحْتَرِمَهَا.
sentences.translation: Pokušavao sam prilagoditi se lokalnim navikama i poštovati ih.
sentences.translationEn: I tried to adapt to the local customs and respect them.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمْتُ أَنَّ الِاخْتِلَافَ لَيْسَ خَطَأً بَلْ هُوَ ثَرَاءٌ.
sentences.translation: Naučio sam da razlika nije greška, već bogatstvo.
sentences.translationEn: I learned that difference is not a mistake but a richness.

sentences.arabic: عُدْتُ إِلَى بَيْتِي أَكْثَرَ تَفَهُّمًا لِلنَّاسِ الْمُخْتَلِفِينَ عَنِّي.
sentences.translation: Vratio sam se kući razumijevajući bolje ljude koji se razlikuju od mene.
sentences.translationEn: I returned home with a better understanding of people who are different from me.
